name: agent-harness-monorepo
description: Agent harness monorepo — generic skills, MCP, and orchestration demo

scripts.clean: rm -rf dist packages/*/dist apps/*/dist; find packages apps \( -name '.tsbuildinfo' -o -name 'tsconfig.tsbuildinfo' -o -name '*.tsbuildinfo' \) -delete 2>/dev/null || true; find packages apps -type f \( -path '*/src/*.js' -o -path '*/src/*.d.ts' -o -path '*/src/*.d.ts.map' \) -delete 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.logs:all: sh -c 'DOCKER_CONTEXT=colima-harness docker logs -f devcontainer-neo4j-1 & DOCKER_CONTEXT=colima-harness docker logs -f devcontainer-ollama-1 & wait'
